---
title: "Schedule"
---

::: {.schedule-grid}
| Week | Mon | Tue | Thu | Fri |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **W1** | 4/20 [Day 1](class/class-1.html):<br>Mastery Learning - Specifications Grading | 4/21 [Day 2](class/class-2.html):<br>(1) Familiarize yourself with class | 4/23 [Day 3](class/class-3.html):<br>(1) Introduction to R | 4/24 [Day 4](class/class-4.html):<br>(1) Interactive Programming Activity |
| **W2** | 4/27 [Day 5](class/class-5.html):<br>(1) Review the Cohesive Analysis | 4/28 [Day 6](class/class-6.html):<br>(1) Practice with Functions | 4/30 [Day 7](class/class-7.html):<br>(1) Describing Functions (practice Reading Mathematics) | 5/1 [Day 8](class/class-8.html):<br>(1) Exponential Function Practice |
| **W3** | 5/4 [Day 9](class/class-9.html):<br>(1) Logarithm Introduction and Practice | 5/5 [Day 10](class/class-10.html):<br>(1) Solving Exponential and Log Equation (videos) | 5/7 [Day 11](class/class-11.html):<br>(1) Reading Practice | 5/8 [Day 12](class/class-12.html):<br>(1) Activity - Operations on Functions |
| **W4** | 5/11 [Day 13](class/class-13.html):<br>(1) Introduction to Probability and Random Variables | 5/12 [Day 14](class/class-14.html):<br>(1) Probability Exercise (Tropical Storms Example) | 5/14 [Day 15](class/class-15.html):<br>(1) Likelihood Practice (with Poisson) | 5/15 [Day 16](class/class-16.html):<br>(1) Local Slope |
| **W5** | 5/18 [Day 17](class/class-17.html):<br>(1) Derivative Rules | 5/19 [Day 18](class/class-18.html):<br>(1) Derivative Rules | 5/21 [Day 19](class/class-19.html):<br>(1) Derivative Rules (Intro to Chain Rule) | 5/22 [Day 20](class/class-20.html):<br>(1) Chain Rule |
| **W6** | 🚫 Memorial Day | 5/26 [Day 21](class/class-21.html):<br>(1) Derivative Relationships | 5/28 [Day 22](class/class-22.html):<br>(1) Derivative Relationships (extended) | 5/29 [Day 23](class/class-23.html):<br>(1) Writing Equations |
| **W7** | 6/1 [Day 24](class/class-24.html):<br>(1) Writing Equations (more practice) | 6/2 [Day 25](class/class-25.html):<br>(1) Extrema Vocabulary | 6/4 [Day 26](class/class-26.html):<br>(1) Making Connections | 6/5 [Day 27](class/class-27.html):<br>(1) Solving Linear Systems |
| **W8** | 6/8 [Day 28](class/class-28.html):<br>(1) Solving a General Linear System with 2 equations and 2 unknowns | 6/9 [Day 29](class/class-29.html):<br>(1) Identifying Maximums and Minimums in Higher Dimensions | 6/11 [Day 30](class/class-30.html):<br>(1) Compare Maximum Likelihood fit to your Visual fit | 6/12 [Day 31](class/class-31.html):<br>(1) Reading Assignment |
| **W9** | 6/15 [Day 32](class/class-32.html):<br>(1) Install Mathematica | 6/16 [Day 33](class/class-33.html):<br>(1) Reading - Rectangles, Targets, and Sums | 6/18 [Day 34](class/class-34.html):<br>(1) Reading - Rectangles, Targets, Sums - Sections 1.7 through 2.3 | 🚫 Juneteenth |
| **W10** | 6/22 [Day 35](class/class-35.html):<br>(1) Reading - Rectangles, Targets, and Sums - Sections 2.3 through 3.2 | 6/23 [Day 36](class/class-36.html):<br>(1) Reading - Rectangles, Targets, and Sums - Sections 4.1 - 4.3 | 6/25 [Day 37](class/class-37.html):<br>(1) Recap Reading - Rectangles, Targets, and Sums | 6/26 [Day 38](class/class-38.html):<br>(1) Creating a PDF and using it to compute the expected value and a probability |
| **W11** | 6/29 [Day 39](class/class-39.html):<br>(1) Practice finding PDF and using them to compute Expected Value and Variance | 6/30 [Day 40](class/class-40.html):<br>(1) Solving a System of Equations | 7/2 [Day 41](class/class-41.html):<br>(1) Making Connections | 🚫 Independence Day |
| **W12** | 7/6 [Day 42](class/class-42.html):<br>(1) Make Connections | 7/7 [Day 43](class/class-43.html):<br>(1) Definite Integrals | 7/9 [Day 44](class/class-44.html):<br>(1) Antiderivative Practice | 7/10 [Day 45](class/class-45.html):<br>(1) CDF's and PDF's (Making Connections) |
| **W13** | 7/13 [Day 46](class/class-46.html):<br>(1) Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Exercises | 7/14 [Flex 1](flex/flex-1.html) | 7/16 [Flex 2](flex/flex-2.html) | 7/17 [Flex 3](flex/flex-3.html) |
| **W14** | 7/20 Project Work Day | 7/21 Project Work Day | — | — |
:::
